programme.title: Jazz
programme.desc: Mainstream jazz.

programme.title: White House Down
programme.desc: Capitol police officer John Cale has just been denied his dream job of protecting President James Sawyer as a member of the Secret Service. Not wanting to disappoint his young daughter with the bad news, Cale takes her on a tour of the White House. While he and his daughter are there, a heavily armed paramilitary group attacks and seizes control. As the nation's government dissolves in chaos, only Cale can save his daughter, the president and the country.

programme.title: The Hangover Part II
programme.desc: Two years after the disastrous events in Las Vegas, it is now Stu's (Ed Helms) turn to walk down the aisle. Since his bride is from Thailand, Stu decides to hold the wedding there. Desperately hoping to avoid the mayhem of Doug's (Justin Bartha) bachelor party, Stu chooses what he thinks will be a safe option: an alcohol-free, pre-wedding brunch. But this being Thailand, and with Phil (Bradley Cooper) and Alan (Zach Galifianakis) again in attendance, anything can happen.

programme.title: Maury
programme.desc: Paternity-test results.

programme.title: Tyler Perry's House of Payne
programme.desc: Curtis gets upset when Calvin and Laura don't want him to cater their wedding; CJ and Jazmine help Jayden get over his stage fright when he and Hayden have parts in the Black History Program at school.

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Doug takes on a supervisory role at IPS to prove to Carrie that he is not content with being a driver for the rest of his life.

programme.title: The World's Funniest Weather
programme.desc: An anchor keeps looking at the wrong camera; a baseball player runs away after his foul ball breaks a window; some of the funniest winter slips ever caught on camera.

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: An investigation into a fire on a Navy vessel leads to a discovery that elevates security at Navy facilities worldwide; Ziva and DiNozzo are called in when an explosive device is found on a ship in Italy.

programme.title: Iron Resurrection Refueled
programme.desc: Joe and crew give their take on the 1950 Chevy truck; their plan is to find an antique body, fit it on a brand new frame and running gear; they find that turning this vintage truck into a modern high performance vehicle is way harder than it looks.

programme.title: Electronic Connection - Vivitar
programme.desc: Capture the memorable moments that make you smile with Vivitar.

programme.title: House of Pop
programme.desc: Pop music is in the house!; featuring big artists from the 80s through the early 00s, including Michael Jackson, Madonna, Britney Spears, Justin Timberlake, Coldplay and more.

programme.title: 2026 Flag Football Classic
programme.desc: Who will claim the title of 2026 Flag Football Classic champions? From BMO Stadium in Los Angeles.

programme.title: Evenings on The Weather Network
programme.desc: Your weather news and local forecasts every 10 minutes on the :10s.

programme.title: Walking The Nile
programme.desc: Lev and his guide Boston are 1100 miles and four months into their journey, in the world's newest nation, South Sudan; arriving in the capital, Juba, Lev and Boston are arrested by secret police.

programme.title: History's Greatest Mysteries [NEW]
programme.desc: A series of shocking murders shake the city of Boston to its core. Each victim, 13 women in all, bore the signature of this serial killer: a bow wrapped around their neck. With the Boston police department facing enormous pressure to bring this predator-or predators-to justice, all eyes are on Boston. Sixty years later, the question remains: who was the Boston Strangler?

programme.title: Bloomberg: The China Show [NEW]
programme.desc: From politics and policy to tech and trends, Yvonne Man and David Ingles give global investors insight into the world's second-biggest economy, delivering in-depth discussions with newsmakers.

programme.title: CGTN Documentary
programme.desc: CGTN Documentary.

programme.title: Tyler Perry's House of Payne
programme.desc: C.J. hosts his first ever poker night at him and Janine's place; Ella expresses her disappointment with the idea of gambling and how it negatively affects the community.

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Doug adopts a dog to impress the neighbors but soon regrets the decision; Arthur helps Danny with his gambling problem.

programme.title: The World's Funniest Weather
programme.desc: A weatherman with mic trouble mimes the weather forecast; a dog makes a muddy mess on an expensive couch; wedding mishaps.

programme.title: Maury
programme.desc: Nasheema and Anissa embrace promiscuity, aspiring to be strippers.

programme.title: George Lopez
programme.desc: Despite his misgivings, George teaches Carmen to drive; Carmen and Jason break up; Benny has a run-in with the law.

programme.title: Funny You Should Ask
programme.desc: Former "Extra" correspondent Jon Kelley hosts this comedy game show that features a panel of comedians interacting with two contestants, who have a chance to win cash if they can read between the lines of the comics' jokes. The contestants ask the comedians questions, to which the jokemakers give humorous answers. The players are tasked with determining if each answer is right or wrong, earning increasingly higher amounts of money as the game progresses. The contestant who has the most money at the end of the game goes on to the bonus round to potentially earn more cash.

programme.title: Tyler Perry's House of Payne
programme.desc: To Curtis' horror, Floyd and Glo begin dating and want to double date with him and Ella; Pookie and Peanut ask CJ to mentor them when they decide to become firefighters.

programme.title: Doll 10 Beauty [NEW]
programme.desc: Skin-loving cosmetics from Doris Dalton.

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: As the team searches for a terrorist targeting the Navy, a bug is found in a probationary agent's tooth; Jimmy Palmer has a bachelor party.

programme.title: Iron Resurrection Refueled
programme.desc: Joe, Amanda and Shag give their commentary on last season's Chevy Master episode; made famous by the gangsters of its time, the Master features a distinctive grill, wood interior and suicide doors.

programme.title: Best of HSN2
programme.desc: A collection of top selling items.

programme.title: House of Pop
programme.desc: Pop music is in the house!; featuring big artists from the 80s through the early 00s, including Michael Jackson, Madonna, Britney Spears, Justin Timberlake, Coldplay and more.

programme.title: World Pro Ski Tour
programme.desc: Events feature the "dual" format of alpine ski racing for both women and men.

programme.title: Evenings on The Weather Network
programme.desc: Your weather news and local forecasts every 10 minutes on the :10s.

programme.title: Walking With Dinosaurs
programme.desc: The dangerous journey of the Pachyrhinosaurus, where survival is at stake during the annual migration hundreds of miles north.

programme.title: Jazz
programme.desc: Mainstream jazz.

programme.title: History's Deadliest With Ving Rhames [NEW]
programme.desc: Cost-cutting moves to save on some of the Titanic's three million rivets; shortcuts taken while building a gladiator stadium in ancient Rome; how a little carelessness triggers deadly engineering failures in history.

programme.title: Maury
programme.desc: Guests learn the results of paternity tests.

programme.title: George Lopez
programme.desc: George agrees to reward Max with a trip to Disneyland for improving his grades, but then he makes up an excuse to get out of following through on his promise.

programme.title: Funny You Should Ask
programme.desc: Former "Extra" correspondent Jon Kelley hosts this comedy game show that features a panel of comedians interacting with two contestants, who have a chance to win cash if they can read between the lines of the comics' jokes. The contestants ask the comedians questions, to which the jokemakers give humorous answers. The players are tasked with determining if each answer is right or wrong, earning increasingly higher amounts of money as the game progresses. The contestant who has the most money at the end of the game goes on to the bonus round to potentially earn more cash.

programme.title: Tyler Perry's House of Payne
programme.desc: Calvin's openness with his passwords lands him in trouble with Laura; the dynamics of professor Louis' relationship with Jazmine change as he makes confession; Calvin Jr., on the other hand, is making Calvin's life difficult.

programme.title: George Lopez
programme.desc: Accident-prone Amy (Sandra Bullock) returns after six months in the hospital, and she is determined to win Randy back.

programme.title: Funny You Should Ask
programme.desc: Jon Lovitz; Sheryl Underwood; Howie Mandel; Byron Allen; Whitney Cummings; Billy Gardell.

programme.title: Get unReady with Shawn [NEW]
programme.desc: After a busy Monday night on air, Program Host Shawn Killinger is ready to get unReady! Join her as she shares the essentials she needs to unwind and decompress, from skincare. to slippers, supplements to snacks and more.

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Shaken by terrorism, the NCIS faces devastating surprises; the case impacts Jimmy Palmer's destination wedding.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Detectives feel a woman is withholding information when they probe the murder of her wealthy husband and very young daughter.

programme.title: Iron Resurrection Refueled
programme.desc: A behind-the-scenes look at the '59 Metro build with Joe, Amanda and Shag; known for their killer cool paint jobs, Martin Bros Customs flips this build on its head; it's the Flinstones meets the Jetsons with a surprise twist for its new owner.

programme.title: Big Deals. Little Time
programme.desc: Wrap up holiday shopping with big deals on holiday essentials and gifts for a limited time only.

programme.title: House of Pop
programme.desc: Pop music is in the house!; featuring big artists from the 80s through the early 00s, including Michael Jackson, Madonna, Britney Spears, Justin Timberlake, Coldplay and more.

programme.title: Insight With Haslinda Amin [NEW]
programme.desc: In a volatile and unpredictable world, the show will be the definitive guide for the global news audience to get the complete picture on the biggest story of the day. With news making executives, officials and thought-leaders from the world of business, politics and academia we will explore a story through probing interviews and nuanced conversations. The hour of programming will also highlight the most relevant stories from India which is currently one of the hottest investment destinations, but also has compelling stories that play into the Bloomberg's priority issues such as Climate change, Diversity and Technological innovation.

programme.title: LIV Golf Highlights
programme.desc: Professional golf highlights from LIV Golf competition.

programme.title: Evenings on The Weather Network
programme.desc: Your weather news and local forecasts every 10 minutes on the :10s.

programme.title: Walking The Nile
programme.desc: Levison Wood sets out to walk the length of the River Nile from source to sea; his nine-month, seven-million-step journey takes him through jungles, savannah, deserts, cities and war zones in some of Africa's most remote and spectacular locations.

programme.title: The Hangover
programme.desc: Two days before his wedding, Doug (Justin Bartha) and three friends (Bradley Cooper, Ed Helms, Zach Galifianakis) drive to Las Vegas for a wild and memorable stag party. In fact, when the three groomsmen wake up the next morning, they can't remember a thing; nor can they find Doug. With little time to spare, the three hazy pals try to re-trace their steps and find Doug so they can get him back to Los Angeles in time to walk down the aisle.

programme.title: History's Deadliest With Ving Rhames
programme.desc: From ancient war machines to devastating weapons of mass destruction, these are the innovations that changed warfare and rank among history's deadliest.

programme.title: Tyler Perry's House of Payne
programme.desc: Calvin teams up with his ex-wife Miranda to get to the bottom of why Laura broke off their engagement; Calvin works with Ella to repair his relationship with Calvin Jr.; Curtis and Floyd attempt to get publicity for their barbecue sauce brand.

programme.title: Maury
programme.desc: Lie-detector tests determine whether men have been cheating.

programme.title: George Lopez
programme.desc: Frustrated about her breakup with Randy, Benny takes a golf club to the hood of her boss's car; Powers Aviation factory is vandalized.

programme.title: Funny You Should Ask
programme.desc: Jon Lovitz; Kim Whitley; Billy Gardell; Byron Allen; Natasha Leggero; Jamie Kennedy.

programme.title: Tyler Perry's House of Payne
programme.desc: When Ella sponsors the membership of the new wife of a longtime dea-con into her social club, Incomparable Crowns, she begins to suspect something may be going on behind closed doors in the new marriage.

programme.title: Roseanne
programme.desc: Roseanne tries to help Dan see the kindness in the lies his father (Ned Beatty) is telling about his mother.

programme.title: The World's Funniest Weather
programme.desc: A news reporter blows his nose on air; a seal steals a fish out of a fisherman's hands; a skateboarding dachshund.

programme.title: Miz Mooz Shoes [NEW]
programme.desc: Featuring fashionable and comfortable footwear.

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Following the bombing of NCIS headquarters, the team engages in a cross-agency manhunt for Harper Dearing.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Evidence points Detectives Briscoe and Curtis in the direction of a fascist youth gathering after the brutal beating and murder of a high-school girl.

programme.title: Iron Resurrection Refueled
programme.desc: Joe and crew give their take on the 1950 Chevy truck; their plan is to find an antique body, fit it on a brand new frame and running gear; they find that turning this vintage truck into a modern high performance vehicle is way harder than it looks.

programme.title: Daily Deals & Top Finds
programme.desc: Featuring daily deals.

programme.title: House of Pop
programme.desc: Pop music is in the house!; featuring big artists from the 80s through the early 00s, including Michael Jackson, Madonna, Britney Spears, Justin Timberlake, Coldplay and more.

programme.title: Insight With Haslinda Amin [NEW]
programme.desc: In a volatile and unpredictable world, the show will be the definitive guide for the global news audience to get the complete picture on the biggest story of the day. With news making executives, officials and thought-leaders from the world of business, politics and academia we will explore a story through probing interviews and nuanced conversations. The hour of programming will also highlight the most relevant stories from India which is currently one of the hottest investment destinations, but also has compelling stories that play into the Bloomberg's priority issues such as Climate change, Diversity and Technological innovation.

programme.title: American Flat Track
programme.desc: Motorcycle action from the American Flat Track racing series.

programme.title: Overnight on The Weather Network
programme.desc: Weather news; next day's complete forecast.

programme.title: Walking The Nile
programme.desc: Lev and his guide Boston are 1100 miles and four months into their journey, in the world's newest nation, South Sudan; arriving in the capital, Juba, Lev and Boston are arrested by secret police.

programme.title: Jazz
programme.desc: Mainstream jazz.

programme.title: History's Greatest Mysteries
programme.desc: A series of shocking murders shake the city of Boston to its core. Each victim, 13 women in all, bore the signature of this serial killer: a bow wrapped around their neck. With the Boston police department facing enormous pressure to bring this predator-or predators-to justice, all eyes are on Boston. Sixty years later, the question remains: who was the Boston Strangler?

programme.title: Maury
programme.desc: Guests reveal devastating secrets to loved ones.

programme.title: Tyler Perry's House of Payne
programme.desc: Jazmine reminds a forgetful C.J. about his first wedding anniversary; Curtis and Ella bring over a cake called No Bueno to celebrate, only to learn there is no celebration to be had; Calvin prepares to attend Pookie's wedding solo.

programme.title: Roseanne
programme.desc: D.J. has serious ethical questions for his mother after Roseanne takes delivery of too many stoves for the diner.

programme.title: The World's Funniest Weather
programme.desc: The Weatherly Awards.

programme.title: Roseanne
programme.desc: Roseanne and Dan are amazed to hear how Bev (Estelle Parsons) broke her pelvis at the retirement home.

programme.title: Martin
programme.desc: Martin (Martin Lawrence) suspects that the woman who has captivated Cole (Carl Anthony Payne II) is not only desirable but also a wanted criminal.

programme.title: The World's Funniest Weather
programme.desc: Two field reporters on skis collide on the slopes; a dog plays volleyball; do-it-yourself fails.

programme.title: Westmore Beauty [NEW]
programme.desc: Professional, Camera-Ready Cosmetics from Famous Hollywood Makeup Family.

programme.title: The A-Team
programme.desc: Smuggling a crooked politician into the country gets complicated when the man is Face's long-lost father.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A shooting sends police divers into the Hudson River where they find a VW bus linked to a murder case closed in the 1960s during student uprisings.

programme.title: Iron Resurrection Refueled
programme.desc: Joe, Amanda and Shag give their commentary on last season's Chevy Master episode; made famous by the gangsters of its time, the Master features a distinctive grill, wood interior and suicide doors.

programme.title: Best of HSN2
programme.desc: A collection of top selling items.

programme.title: Classic Videos
programme.desc: Music videos.

programme.title: Bloomberg Horizons Middle East & Africa [NEW]
programme.desc: A spotlight on the fast paced growth and major deals happening across the Middle East and Africa, linking the market drivers from overnight in the U.S. and across Asia into the region's trading day, with deep-dive analysis of the top businesses.

programme.title: Overnight on The Weather Network
programme.desc: Weather news; next day's complete forecast.

programme.title: Walking With Dinosaurs
programme.desc: The dangerous journey of the Pachyrhinosaurus, where survival is at stake during the annual migration hundreds of miles north.

programme.title: Rodeo
programme.desc: The best moments from The Governor's Cup Pro Rodeo, where top cowboys and cowgirls make their final push at punching their tickets to the National Finals Rodeo. Experience all the highlights, the heartbreak, and the glory from this pivotal event.

programme.title: CGTN Documentary
programme.desc: CGTN Documentary.

programme.title: History's Greatest Mysteries
programme.desc: At the end of World War II, many Nazi officials were captured and tried for their crimes; but one of the architects of the Holocaust, Adolf Eichmann, slipped through the cracks, repeatedly eluding Nazi hunters from around the globe.

programme.title: Maury
programme.desc: Guests learn the results of paternity tests.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: A bar in St. Clair, Missouri, whose owners, a pair of estranged brothers, have let the business collapse amidst their fighting and now need help saving it.

programme.title: Roseanne
programme.desc: Dan turns to a soap opera for help in an attempt to rekindle the romance in his marriage.

programme.title: Martin
programme.desc: A mugger robs Cole, stealing Martin's gift for Gina.; guests Salt N' Pepa.

programme.title: The World's Funniest Weather
programme.desc: The host accidentally breaks a one-of-a-kind model; a woman clings to a patio umbrella during a windstorm; a gender reveal party goes wrong.

programme.title: The Nanny
programme.desc: C.C. (Lauren Lane) is annoyed when Maxwell (Charles Shaughnessy) hires a gorgeous publicist (Catherine Oxenberg) to help him with his image.

programme.title: Martin
programme.desc: Martin's (Martin Lawrence) interference causes Gina (Tisha Campbell) to lose her job and become a full-time homemaker.

programme.title: Comics Unleashed With Byron Allen
programme.desc: Dwight Slade; Bryan Kellen; Tig Notaro; Bone Hampton.

programme.title: Philosophy -- Beauty [NEW]
programme.desc: Line of skin care, fragrance, bath and body products and cosmetics.

programme.title: The A-Team
programme.desc: The team heads to Hong Kong to look for missing Hannibal and a stolen, leaking canister of plutonium; guests Soon-Teck Oh, Rosalind Chao.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Discovery of a parolee's corpse in a car trunk sends detectives after a suspect that bounty hunters also want, dead or alive.

programme.title: Iron Resurrection Refueled
programme.desc: A behind-the-scenes look at the '59 Metro build with Joe, Amanda and Shag; known for their killer cool paint jobs, Martin Bros Customs flips this build on its head; it's the Flinstones meets the Jetsons with a surprise twist for its new owner.

programme.title: Home Solutions
programme.desc: Problem solving products for in and around the home.

programme.desc: Music videos.

programme.title: Bloomberg Daybreak: Europe [NEW]
programme.desc: From London, essential morning viewing to stay ahead of the day's market trends with news stories from the U.S. and Asia in the lead-up to the opening of European markets.

programme.title: Dream in Colour
programme.desc: Soothing music and visuals for a tranquil night's journey into vibrant dreams.

programme.title: Life Below Zero
programme.desc: The warm season provides for Alaskans.

programme.title: Jazz
programme.desc: Mainstream jazz.

programme.title: History's Deadliest With Ving Rhames
programme.desc: From ancient war machines to devastating weapons of mass destruction, these are the innovations that changed warfare and rank among history's deadliest.

programme.title: Maury
programme.desc: Men who deny being fathers take paternity tests.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon attempts to save the legendary Las Vegas speakeasy Capo's Restaurant and bring it back to its pre-pandemic glory.

programme.title: The Nanny
programme.desc: Fran is arrested for owning an unlicensed singles party business and Uncle Manny comes to the rescue.

programme.title: The Jamie Foxx Show
programme.desc: Jamie and Braxton (Jamie Foxx, Christopher B. Duncan) must endure the rigors of a tough driving school and its hard-nosed officer (guest star Mark Curry).

programme.title: Comics Unleashed With Byron Allen
programme.desc: Gene Pompa; Jeff Capri; Susan Prekel; W. Kamau Bell.

programme.title: The Nanny
programme.desc: Maxwell (Charles Shaughnessy) pops the big question to Fran (Fran Drescher) just to aggravate his mother (Dina Merrill). With Daniel Davis and Lauren Lane.

programme.title: The Jamie Foxx Show
programme.desc: Jamie (Jamie Foxx) forgets Uncle Junior's (Garrett Morris) birthday, but hatches a plan to make it up to him. Guest stars: Ben Vereen and Savion Glover.

programme.title: Comics Unleashed With Byron Allen
programme.desc: Rudy Moreno; Noe Gonzalez; Sandra Valls; Manny Maldonado.

programme.title: Miz Mooz Shoes

programme.title: The A-Team
programme.desc: Stranded on a remote island with Face and Frankie, Murdock is worshiped as a deity by Polynesian warriors.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Curtis probe the murder of a popular Harlem community leader; McCoy and Carmichael struggle to prevent a chaotic situation.

programme.title: Iron Resurrection Refueled
programme.desc: Joe, Amanda and Shag give the inside scoop on last season's 1970 Chevy C10 truck transformation to powerful autocross hot rod; Joe and the team may just have to rebuild from frame to fender.

programme.desc: Unique kitchen products designed to make life easier and spend less time in the kitchen.

programme.title: Classic Videos
programme.desc: Music videos.

programme.title: The American Performance Horseman
programme.desc: From Dickies Arena in Fort Worth, Texas.

programme.title: Dream in Colour
programme.desc: Soothing music and visuals for a tranquil night's journey into vibrant dreams.

programme.title: Mysteries From Above
programme.desc: Zoom in on some otherworldly sights; spot a giant glacier on the Red Planet, let the milky seas off the coast of Java bathe your vision, ponder a huge hexagon floating above Saturn and take a spin around a doughnut-shaped lake in Saskatchewan.

programme.title: Bloomberg The Opening Trade [NEW]
programme.desc: "The Opening Trade" explores things to know as markets open across Europe; analysis that isn't available anywhere else, a break-down of the biggest stories of the day and top guests who have skin in the game.

programme.title: History's Deadliest With Ving Rhames
programme.desc: Cost-cutting moves to save on some of the Titanic's three million rivets; shortcuts taken while building a gladiator stadium in ancient Rome; how a little carelessness triggers deadly engineering failures in history.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: In a desert town, Taffer collides with the owner of a bar in a roller rink, a local landmark close to closing for good.

programme.title: The Nanny
programme.desc: An actress (Donna Dixon) who is a single mother prompts Fran (Fran Drescher) to consider artificial insemination. With Charles Shaughnessy and Daniel Davis.

programme.title: The Jamie Foxx Show
programme.desc: Jamie poses as a British painter during an art auction and winds up searching for a collector's stolen painting.

programme.title: Comics Unleashed With Byron Allen
programme.desc: Stephen Thomas; Andre Kelley; Tracey MacDonald; John Caponera.

programme.title: Bob Hearts Abishola
programme.desc: Abishola and Kemi are conflicted as to how to handle Morenike after she confides her deepest secret to them; when Bob gets credit for Christina's idea for a Twitter marketing campaign, she considers leaving MaxDot.

programme.title: Tyler Perry's House of Payne
programme.desc: In the middle of a city-wide egg shortage, Curtis searches for reasonably priced eggs; Lisa attempts to gain professional work experience by going to work with the Paynes.

programme.title: The World's Funniest Weather
programme.desc: A computer glitch turns a weather map screen hot pink; a broken fire hydrant turns a pickup truck into a giant ice cube; a funny version of "The Nutcracker Suite."

programme.title: Peace Love World - Fashion
programme.desc: Casual-cool fashion with inspirational messages.

programme.title: The A-Team
programme.desc: Murdock poses as a secret agent to investigate a terrorist group based in Monte Carlo; guests Roy Dotrice, Toru Tanaka.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Discovery of a corpse in Battery Park reunites squads when the victim turns out to be a Baltimore official. (Concluding on "Homicide: Life on the Street.")

programme.title: Iron Resurrection Refueled
programme.desc: Joe, Amanda and Shag share a never-before-seen edition of the 1962 Impala episode; a pristine '62 Impala owned by a customer who wants to cut it up, strip it back, and add more horsepower; everything comes to a halt when money troubles show up.

programme.desc: Music videos.

programme.title: Pokerstars Big Game on Tour
programme.desc: More high stakes Hold'em from Las Vegas. Alan Keating's unorthodox style leaves comedian Morgan Jay lost for lyrics, while Loose Cannon Luke attempts a bold bluff for tens of thousands of dollars.

programme.desc: Weather news; next day's complete forecast.

programme.title: Earth's Natural Wonders
programme.desc: In many of the world's natural wonders there is an abundance of animals, which can either be a threat to the people who live there or provide a means of survival.

programme.title: Protect Your Family From Identity Theft
programme.desc: Every five seconds there's a victim of identity theft; LifeLock helps alert, restore identity and reimburse lost funds-leading the way in protecting families every day.

programme.desc: Taffer tries to calm the sparks between three loud-mouthed firefighting brothers struggling to keep their Queens bar afloat.

programme.title: Bob Hearts Abishola
programme.desc: After Abishola has a romantic dream about Bob, she tries to suppress her feelings for him and pays the price.

programme.title: Tyler Perry's House of Payne
programme.desc: When Calvin Jr.'s mom can't take him to the mother-son dance, Miranda and Laura compete to be her replacement.

programme.title: The World's Funniest Weather

programme.desc: Cardiologist Dr. Ernst von Schwarz, M.D. shows how to manage your blood pressure naturally and help protect your heart for life with My Best Heart.

programme.desc: A group of senior citizens protects a scientist's teenage daughter from the KGB; guests Lew Ayres, John McLiam.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Curtis investigate the death of a girl who managed to die, unnoticed, amid the hustle and bustle of an ER's waiting room.

programme.desc: Jonathan, Lisa and Annmarie survey the economy and global markets with daily conversations with leaders and decision makers, from Wall Street to Washington and beyond, to cover the latest in business, investment and geopolitics.

programme.title: The Trisha Goddard Show
programme.desc: Breanna has caught her boyfriend sexting other women; LaBrandyn and Chanitta return to the show, with Chanitta's sister, who thinks LaBrandyn is the father of her child.

programme.title: Entertainment Tonight [NEW]
programme.desc: News and features about performers, productions and the milieu.

programme.title: David Jeremiah
programme.desc: In this weekly program, Dr. David Jeremiah delivers practical messages to the congregation at the Shadow Mountain Community Church in San Diego. Also featured is music from the Shadow Mountain Community Church Choir and Orchestra, as well as performances by musical guests that have included Steve Green and Charles Billingsley. Men and women who have been impacted by the Turning Point ministry also share their stories with viewers. During the month of December, "Turning Point" usually features special Christmas programming.

programme.title: Tyler Perry's Meet the Browns
programme.desc: Brown thinks he has a secret weapon to win a gospel choir contest that he has lost six straight years; Cora's childhood friend is frustrated with her marriage.

programme.title: STIHL Timbersports
programme.desc: From Milwaukee.

programme.title: The Trisha Goddard Show
programme.desc: Ray Ray believes that her fiance is sleeping with the friend she enlisted to help investigate his behavior; Jerrica and her husband pack up and move every time she suspects he is cheating.

programme.title: Tyler Perry's Meet the Browns
programme.desc: The school suspends Brianna; after playing a prank on Brown, two wannabe frat brothers must work for him.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Scotty faces prejudice when he defends a disfigured artist on an assault charge. With Michael Landon and Victor French.

programme.title: The A-Team
programme.desc: A journalist asks the A-Team to search for her missing colleague in Mexico. With George Peppard, Dirk Benedict, Mr. T, Dwight Schultz.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Bar expert Jon Taffer goes toe-to-toe with a former baseball player turned bar owner as he tries to revive the Canyon Inn, a decaying bar on its last legs.

programme.title: Bones
programme.desc: A girl's decomposed remains are found in a refrigerator, leading Brennan to confront her former mentor.

programme.title: The Curse of Oak Island
programme.desc: After a find in the swamp proves to be at least 500 years old, the Oak Island team uncovers another manmade structure on lot five.

programme.title: Trans Am
programme.desc: Scott's big gamble on a Vista Cruiser could leave him on the hook for $100,000; Todd plans the future at Worldwide, adding a Trans Am Super Duty to their production model, but it needs to be ready for SEMA.

programme.title: Weather Gone Viral
programme.desc: Weather destroys power grids, floods homes, uproots mature trees, tosses huge trucks like toys and ends lives without remorse; when weather attacks, there's rarely a way to stop it.

programme.title: Wake Up with John [NEW]
programme.desc: Start your Tuesday with a smile when you Wake Up with Program Host John Battagliese. John is ON, and he's bringing you a host of ideas to make your life a little easier, your wardrobe a little brighter, and your home a little warmer.

programme.title: Tyler Perry's Meet the Browns
programme.desc: Fearing that she will move out, Brown interferes with Cora's relationship; Carmen announces that Brianna and Joaquin's former foster family has agreed to adopt them.

programme.title: Cutlers Court
programme.desc: A battle over co-parenting takes a twist as Rico pushes for a second chance, but Alyssa intends to stand firm.

programme.title: Malcolm & Eddie
programme.desc: After deciding they need a company car, Malcolm buys a lemon, which Eddie replaces with a sport utility vehicle.

programme.title: Roadkill Garage
programme.desc: Freiburger and Dulcich tune up the supercharged big block in the '69 Crusher Impala at Westech's dyno before hitting the road and the dragstrip. The guys run the Impala's fastest time in the quarter mile, but discover some new Roadkill-level issues.

programme.title: Tyler Perry's Meet the Browns
programme.desc: Will and Sasha try to find a way to get Brianna and Joaquin back before the Turners adopt them.

programme.title: The World's Funniest Weather
programme.desc: A call-in viewer's bad singing causes a TV host to lose control; camping mishaps.

programme.title: The A-Team
programme.desc: The A-Team must fight the drug lord who has imprisoned a journalist in Mexico. With George Peppard, Dirk Benedict, Mr. T, Dwight Schultz.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: A bar owner's adult grandchildren use it as their own personal playground.

programme.title: Bones
programme.desc: Construction workers find a skeleton in an old fallout shelter from the 1950s and the Jeffersonian is brought in to help identify the remains; when Zack cuts into the bone, he accidentally releases spores of the deadly fungus Valley Fever, causing the team to be quarantined in the lab over Christmas; while everyone tries to maintain the holiday spirit, Brennan buckles down to solve the mystery of the fallout shelter.

programme.desc: As the team finds more traces of treasure in the Money Pit, they discover a clue that may guide them to the ultimate answers on Oak Island.

programme.title: Mysteries From Above
programme.desc: Explores strongholds abandoned by their architects; a lost city in the Amazon jungle; a desert fortress made by humanity's most notorious empire; explores a city of identical castles; examines a Greek isle's bloody history from the air.

programme.title: Cutlers Court
programme.desc: A sperm donor, suspicions of infidelity, and broken trust bring Shannon and Jasmine's rocky five-year romance to the courtroom.

programme.desc: Brown starts charging the residents for amenities around the house, which gets out of hand.

programme.title: Cutlers Court
programme.desc: Kenneth sues his wife, Monika, for $1,000 in property damage because she burned his clothes after he refused to clean up after himself.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show
programme.desc: A replacement singer (guest star Adrian Zmed) shocks Steve's (Steve Harvey) band, the Hi-Tops, with his talented vocals.

programme.title: Tyler Perry's Meet the Browns
programme.desc: Brianna and Joaquin's mother returns from jail and discovers that Will and Sasha plan to adopt the kids.

programme.title: The World's Funniest Weather
programme.desc: A field reporter inhales a fly mid-broadcast; a golfer loses his balance and topples into a lake; some of the funniest dog moments ever caught on camera.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Four Irish sisters bicker as their San Francisco bar struggles; Taffer tries to turn their luck around before their American dream gets away from them.

programme.title: Karamo
programme.desc: After a night of too much drinking, Ro Ro says that some of her money went missing, and she suspects her cousin and a former friend; John wants to know if he is the biological dad of daughter Caitlin, whose birth certificate says "father unknown."

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Frasier finds himself attracted to the station manager (Mercedes Ruehl) during labor negotiations.

programme.title: The Jamie Foxx Show
programme.desc: Helen (Ellia English) ends up in therapy after an encounter with a mugger.

programme.title: Funny You Should Ask
programme.desc: Former "Extra" correspondent Jon Kelley hosts this comedy game show that features a panel of comedians interacting with two contestants, who have a chance to win cash if they can read between the lines of the comics' jokes. The contestants ask the comedians questions, to which the jokemakers give humorous answers. The players are tasked with determining if each answer is right or wrong, earning increasingly higher amounts of money as the game progresses. The contestant who has the most money at the end of the game goes on to the bonus round to potentially earn more cash.

programme.title: Tennis Channel Live at the Miami Open [NEW]
programme.desc: Latest news and highlights from the Miami Open.

programme.title: The A-Team
programme.desc: A boy (Meeno Peluce) whose brother (William Smith) has been unlawfully imprisoned asks his friend B.A. for help; guest Ken Norton.

programme.title: Bones
programme.desc: When a woman's burned body is found in a car with evidence that her child was kidnapped, Brennan and Booth's investigation leads to a suspect who is in the Witness Protection Program.

programme.title: The Curse of Oak Island
programme.desc: After a new Bobby Dazzler is unearthed on Lot five, the Oak Island team makes a discovery with possible religious implications.

programme.title: Shorty's Dream Shop
programme.desc: Arturo is a good friend of the shop, and his classic Nova will be a monster, with a rebuilt supercharged 6.2 LS, plus upgrades to the chassis and brakes; the crew revives a classic 1924 LaFrance fire truck for the nearby Cedar Hill Fire Department.

programme.title: Funny You Should Ask
programme.desc: Former "Extra" correspondent Jon Kelley hosts this comedy game show that features a panel of comedians interacting with two contestants, who have a chance to win cash if they can read between the lines of the comics' jokes. The contestants ask the comedians questions, to which the jokemakers give humorous answers. The players are tasked with determining if each answer is right or wrong, earning increasingly higher amounts of money as the game progresses. programme.title: Karamo
programme.desc: Brietta discovered Kertis was cheating on her and she doesn't know if she can ever trust him again; Jenna and Angela believe that family member Tameeka's online boyfriend is taking advantage of her.

programme.desc: Taffer rescues a successful bar, the beacon of a community, that was destroyed by flooding in Louisiana.

programme.desc: After verifying a recent find on Lot 5 to be a sacred, religious artifact, the team drills through a surprising discovery deep in the Money Pit area.

programme.desc: An Amber Glow 1955 DeSoto might be pink, but it has a hemi under the hood; 2000 Chevy dually is a monster, but needs a new paint job, interior and air ride system.

programme.title: Home Solutions
programme.desc: Problem solving products for in and around the home.

programme.title: I Want My 80s
programme.desc: Music videos from the decade.

programme.title: Bloomberg Tech [NEW]
programme.desc: Bloomberg Tech is the only daily live technology program with a focus on breaking news, market-moving reporting and analysis of global technology companies and stories. The program brings the audience interviews from the biggest names in the business, offering in-depth analysis and critical insights.

programme.title: Race for the Seat
programme.desc: Mini Tyrrell celebrates his victory in the RAM commercial challenge; the drivers face off again in Late Model cars, but this time at the famous Caraway Speedway in Sophia, North Carolina.

programme.title: Weather AM
programme.desc: Forecasts for all of Canada with relevant weather stories to start the day.

programme.title: Mysteries From Above
programme.desc: Explores strongholds abandoned by their architects; a lost city in the Amazon jungle; a desert fortress made by humanity's most notorious empire; explores a city of identical castles; examines a Greek isle's bloody history from the air.

programme.title: Captain Phillips
programme.desc: In April 2009, the U.S. container ship Maersk Alabama sails toward its destination on a day that seems like any other. Suddenly, Somali pirates race toward the vessel, climb aboard and take everyone hostage. The captain of the ship, Richard Phillips, looks to protect his crew from the hostile invaders, and their leader, Muse. The pirates are after millions of dollars, and Phillips must use his wits to make sure everyone survives and returns home safely.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: On the advice of his friends, Frasier declares his love for Kate (Mercedes Ruehl) -- but she has other plans.

programme.title: The Jamie Foxx Show
programme.desc: Junior and Helen offer a free getaway, but a weekend together doesn't appeal to Jamie, Fancy and Braxton.

programme.title: Funny You Should Ask
programme.desc: Jon Lovitz; Kim Whitley; Billy Gardell; Byron Allen; Natasha Leggero; Jamie Kennedy.

programme.title: Karamo
programme.desc: Tonya wants to find out if her fiancé, Brian, is cheating; a 20-year marriage is in a tailspin after the husband is caught with another woman.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: A son takes over the failing family business and must battle his belligerent father, a volatile cook, and a filthy kitchen before Jon Taffer shuts it down.

programme.title: Roseanne
programme.desc: The death of her father forces Roseanne to confront her feelings about his abusive behavior and his mistress.

programme.title: The Jamie Foxx Show
programme.desc: Jamie (Jamie Foxx) hopes to find the perfect mate when the game show "Change of Heart" holds auditions. With Garrett Morris.

programme.title: The World's Funniest Weather
programme.desc: A robotic camera goes haywire during a live newscast; a kid playing soccer in his backyard shatters his mom's patio table.

programme.title: Q Check - A Big Deal [NEW]
programme.desc: Fast-Paced, weekday shopping destination.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Detectives Lupo and Bernard have trouble finding a motive when a firefighter and his wife are found tortured and murdered in their new home.

programme.title: The Curse of Oak Island
programme.desc: When the team finds an artifact on Lot 8 that may date to medieval times, it leads them to another, massive discovery.

programme.title: Junkyard Empire
programme.desc: Andy stumbles across a Mercedes-Benz SL55 AMG that he hopes to flip, but soon realizes that he may have bitten off more than he can chew; Andy's father manages to turn a marketing idea into a mess.

programme.title: I Want My 80s
programme.desc: Music videos from the decade.

programme.title: Bloomberg Crypto [NEW]
programme.desc: The latest news, analysis and interviews covering the people, transactions and technology shaping the world of decentralized finance.

programme.title: Race for the Seat
programme.desc: With the competition heating up, tempers boil over at the house; the drivers head to Pratt Miller for a high-tech simulator challenge; the drivers' physical fitness is put to the test as they endure an intense CrossFit challenge.

programme.title: Weather AM
programme.desc: Forecasts for all of Canada with relevant weather stories to start the day.

programme.title: Hope for Wildlife
programme.desc: Something big and brown is headed to "Hope for Wildlife," but this black bear is tied up in red tape.

programme.title: Jazz
programme.desc: Mainstream jazz.

programme.title: Jerry Springer
programme.desc: A woman suspects her husband is cheating on her; a woman confronts her husband's mistress; a man wants to call it quits with both of the women in his life.

programme.title: Roseanne
programme.desc: Roseanne's visiting cousin rekindles a family feud when she encourages Darlene to drop out of school and follow her dreams.

programme.title: The Jamie Foxx Show
programme.desc: Jamie and Uncle Junior rewire the hotel; Jamie dates Fancy's gold-digging pal.

programme.title: The World's Funniest Weather
programme.desc: A news anchor has a sneezing fit on live TV; a prank with a drone and a giant water balloon; a montage of slipping and sliding cars.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon Taffer tries to convince a foul-mouthed owner to change his ways before the bar he owns with his ex-wife shuts down for good.

programme.title: Roseanne
programme.desc: The Conners and the Tildens attend the taping of "The Jackie Thomas Show" when they drive to Hollywood in the Tilden's motor home.

programme.title: The Jamie Foxx Show
programme.desc: Jamie is awarded a civic honor for his heroism in the hotel fire; Silas and Fancy rekindle their love.

programme.title: The World's Funniest Weather
programme.desc: A news reporter forgets he is on live TV; a skateboarding dog; gender reveal mishaps.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The double murder of two young scientists leads detectives to a jealous, mentally disturbed woman.

programme.title: The Curse of Oak Island
programme.desc: As the team makes a potentially key discovery beneath a boulder on Lot 8, new clues arise that could identify who was behind the Oak Island mystery.

programme.title: Junkyard Empire
programme.desc: Andy agrees to an ambitious paintball tank build and makes a friendly bet with his father over a pickup truck.

programme.title: Daily Deals & Top Finds
programme.desc: Featuring daily deals.

programme.title: Rock Block
programme.desc: A mix of rock videos.

programme.title: Bloomberg: Balance of Power [NEW]
programme.desc: Focusing on the intersection of politics and global business.

programme.title: Race for the Seat
programme.desc: With only two challenges remaining, the drivers head to South Boston Speedway for an epic showdown in Legend Cars.

programme.title: Daytime on the Weather Network
programme.desc: Developing weather stories and up-to-date forecasts.

programme.title: Life Below Zero
programme.desc: In summer's home stretch, family ties run deep; Cole hunts for protein in the rain; Jessie gathers the last of the warm weather bounty; the Hailstones track shy prey; Ricko's legacy project.

programme.title: Spring Into Style -- Accessories [NEW]
programme.desc: Stylish spring accessories.

programme.title: CGTN Documentary
programme.desc: CGTN Documentary.

programme.title: Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Rebecca demands that her sister, Robin, divorce so that she can marry her man; next, Chrissy is here to tell her boyfriend, John, that she's dumping him for his son; later, Paul wants to dump his pregnant girlfriend for their neighbor.

programme.title: Roseanne
programme.desc: Dan and Roseanne fight over letting Darlene's boyfriend move in.

programme.title: The Jamie Foxx Show
programme.desc: Jamie (Jamie Foxx) tries to get Fancy's (Garcelle Beauvais) attention with a serenade before her wedding, but he may be too late.

programme.title: The World's Funniest Weather
programme.desc: A janitor starts cleaning a window behind the anchor during a live newscast; a passenger on an ATV falls in the mud; kids stuck inside on a snowy day.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon Taffer tries to rescue a Jacksonville sports bar with a horrible reputation and an even worse name that leaves the bar without a single customer.

programme.title: George Lopez
programme.desc: Angie plans a surprise birthday party for George; an accident-prone employee (Sandra Bullock) returns to work at the factory.

programme.title: The Jamie Foxx Show
programme.desc: Fancy mistakes a hotel guest (Debbe Dunning) as Jamie's girlfriend; Braxton schemes to bring Fancy's ex-fiance back into the picture.

programme.title: Comics Unleashed With Byron Allen
programme.desc: Ahmed Ahmed; Aron Kader; Maz Jobrani; Dean Obeidallah.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Detectives Lupo and Bernard investigate three murders that appear to be the work of a serial killer.

programme.title: The Curse of Oak Island
programme.desc: While the team investigates a Knight of Malta who may have visited Oak Island, they record video of possible treasure buried underground.

programme.title: Texas Metal
programme.desc: Bill and the team fix another shop's mistakes when a 2017 F-350 is hauled into the shop broken due to a botched lift; a client insists on the ultimate tailgating BBQ trailer with custom everything.

programme.desc: Unique kitchen products designed to make life easier and spend less time in the kitchen.

programme.desc: A mix of rock videos.

programme.title: Bloomberg Businessweek Daily [NEW]
programme.desc: Carol Massar and Tim Stenovec bring reporting from the magazine that helps global leaders stay ahead, plus insight on the people, companies and trends shaping today's complex economy.

programme.title: Race for the Seat
programme.desc: Everyone heads back to South Boston Speedway for the final challenge of the competition, a Late Models showdown, where the season winner is crowned.

programme.title: Daytime on the Weather Network
programme.desc: Developing weather stories and up-to-date forecasts.

programme.title: Walking The Nile
programme.desc: Levison Wood sets out to walk the length of the River Nile from source to sea; his nine-month, seven-million-step journey takes him through jungles, savannah, deserts, cities and war zones in some of Africa's most remote and spectacular locations.

programme.title: Jazz
programme.desc: Mainstream jazz.

programme.title: White House Down
programme.desc: Capitol police officer John Cale has just been denied his dream job of protecting President James Sawyer as a member of the Secret Service. Not wanting to disappoint his young daughter with the bad news, Cale takes her on a tour of the White House. While he and his daughter are there, a heavily armed paramilitary group attacks and seizes control. As the nation's government dissolves in chaos, only Cale can save his daughter, the president and the country.

programme.title: Jerry Springer
programme.desc: A woman has an affair with her daughter's husband; a man sleeps with his fiancee's uncle.

programme.title: George Lopez
programme.desc: George and Benny try to fill jailed Jim's spot in a carpool; George tests Max's street smarts with devious tricks.

programme.title: The Jamie Foxx Show
programme.desc: Jamie quits his job at the hotel to write commercial jingles after he is passed over for a promotion.

programme.title: Comics Unleashed With Byron Allen
programme.desc: Jimmy Dore; John Caparulo; Melinda Hill; Deon Cole.

programme.title: George Lopez
programme.desc: After discovering the father he thought dead might be alive, George resolves to find him regardless of the outcome.

programme.title: The Fresh Prince of Bel-Air
programme.desc: Murder witness Will enters a witness protection program and life in an Alabama trailer park.

programme.title: Comics Unleashed With Byron Allen
programme.desc: Steve Mazan; Arj Barker; Morgan Murphy; Jonathan Slocumb.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The murder of a well-known charity executive leads detectives down a path of political intrigue.

programme.title: The Curse of Oak Island
programme.desc: After compelling new clues are discovered in the swamp and on Lot 8, the team finds an astonishing silver lining in the Money Pit.

programme.title: Texas Metal
programme.desc: Bill knows all too well that families are the lifeblood of the custom truck scene; a customer wants to transform a 1965 Ford Falcon Club Wagon into a fully custom family cruiser; a 1966 Cobra replica gets reinforced.

programme.title: Earth's Natural Wonders
programme.desc: In some natural wonders people push themselves to the limit, and survival requires skill, ingenuity and bravery.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: For his 200th rescue, Jon rescues a family who bought a Mexican restaurant at the height of the pandemic and put their daughter's future on the line to chase the bright lights of Vegas.

programme.title: Gourmet Holiday
programme.desc: Gourmet foods for everyday dining, holiday entertaining or gift-giving.

programme.desc: Romaine Bostick and Katie Greifeld break down the day's top market-moving stories and trading action around the closing bell.

programme.title: Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Jessica says she's been fighting for her man for two years.

programme.desc: George learns a lesson in company loyalty when his bosses ask him to pitch in on the assembly line and he's offered a job by a competitor with ulterior motives.

programme.desc: Will courts pain when he dates the new sorority pledge; Geoffrey has a job-related injury.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Parents trade accusations of child abuse; a woman wants her sister to leave her abusive boyfriend, but the victim wants her family to mind their own business.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Trina's fiance says he heard a voicemail that sounded like her having sex with another man; Amy has put up with her boyfriend's constant accusations of cheating for four years.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: A man takes a lie-detector test after being accused of molesting his girlfriend's child.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Melissa suspects that her long-distance boyfriend is not real, but is a false persona created by her best friend; a text message from a stranger informs Beverly that her husband is posting on numerous websites to cheat on her.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Kela suspects her boyfriend of cheating; an older man who got a 16-year-old pregnant denies that the baby is his.
